title: Transaction History Scroll Performance

context.architecture: Microservices, gRPC, OAuth2/OIDC, local encrypted SQLite, device secure enclave
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Ensure long transaction lists remain smooth and responsive.
acceptanceCriteria: Scrolling through 5,000 transactions must sustain >= 50 FPS on supported devices.
Initial transaction history load must complete within 2.0 seconds P95 on 4G.
Incremental page fetch must return results within 400 ms P95.

title: Biometric Failure Fallback and Lockout

context.architecture: Microservices, gRPC, OAuth2/OIDC, local encrypted SQLite, device secure enclave
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Protect accounts when biometric authentication repeatedly fails.
acceptanceCriteria: After 3 consecutive biometric failures, app must require PIN/password authentication.
After 5 failed PIN attempts within 10 minutes, account must be locked for 15 minutes.
Fallback screen must render within 300 ms after biometric failure.

title: Background Task Resilience

context.architecture: Microservices, gRPC, OAuth2/OIDC, local encrypted SQLite, device secure enclave
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Ensure background jobs complete reliably despite OS interruptions.
acceptanceCriteria: Interrupted background sync must resume within 60 seconds of app foreground.
No more than 1 background job may be lost per 10,000 executions.
Background retry queue must persist at least 500 pending jobs.

title: Form Error Highlighting and Readability

context.architecture: Native iOS UI, design system, encrypted storage
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Ensure form errors are visible and quickly understandable.
acceptanceCriteria: Invalid fields must be highlighted within 100 ms after validation fails.
Error text must have contrast ratio >= 4.5:1.
At least 90% of users (n>=15) must correctly fix the error within 20 seconds in usability testing.

title: Scheduled Payment Processing Latency

context.architecture: Microservices, gRPC, OAuth2/OIDC, local encrypted SQLite, device secure enclave
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Ensure scheduled payments are processed and reflected promptly.
acceptanceCriteria: Scheduled payment execution status must update within 5 seconds P95 after trigger.
Backend processing time must be <= 800 ms P95 per payment.
Push confirmation must be delivered within 15 seconds P95.

title: Clipboard and Autofill Data Protection

context.architecture: Native iOS UI, secure text fields, encrypted local storage
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Prevent leakage of sensitive data via clipboard and autofill.
acceptanceCriteria: Sensitive fields must block clipboard copy with 100% coverage.
Autofill must mask account numbers except last 4 digits.
Any attempt to paste scripts into sensitive fields must be rejected within 150 ms.

title: Service Timeout and Graceful Abort

context.architecture: Microservices, gRPC, OAuth2/OIDC, local encrypted SQLite, device secure enclave
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Ensure stalled service calls fail predictably and recover safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Any API call exceeding 10 seconds must timeout and return control to UI.
After timeout, retry option must be enabled within 300 ms.
No more than 0.5% of calls may exceed 12 seconds over 24 hours.

title: Localization and Text Expansion Handling

context.architecture: Native iOS UI, localization framework
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Ensure UI remains usable with longer localized strings.
acceptanceCriteria: UI must support text expansion up to 35% without truncation on 95% of screens.
Localized screen load time must not increase by more than 150 ms.
No critical action button may be hidden at 200% text scale.

title: Image Asset Caching Efficiency

context.architecture: CDN, local encrypted cache, native iOS UI
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Reduce network usage and speed up repeated UI loads.
acceptanceCriteria: Cached assets must load within 80 ms P95.
Repeat visit network usage must be reduced by >= 60%.
Cache eviction must occur when storage exceeds 120 MB.

title: API Abuse Detection and Throttling

context.architecture: Microservices, gRPC, OAuth2/OIDC, local encrypted SQLite, device secure enclave
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Detect abnormal client behavior and protect backend services.
acceptanceCriteria: Client making >100 requests/minute to sensitive endpoints must be throttled.
Throttle response must be returned within 120 ms P95.
Abuse events must be logged within 1 second of detection.

title: App Update Backward Compatibility

context.architecture: Microservices, API versioning, encrypted local storage
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Ensure older app versions fail gracefully after backend upgrades.
acceptanceCriteria: Deprecated API versions must be supported for at least 90 days.
Unsupported versions must receive an upgrade prompt within 2 seconds of launch.
No more than 0.2% of users may encounter blocking errors after backend upgrade.

title: Gesture Consistency and Discoverability

context.architecture: Native iOS UI, gesture recognizers
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Ensure gestures are consistent and easy to discover.
acceptanceCriteria: Gesture-triggered actions must have visible hints on first use.
Undo gesture must respond within 100 ms.
In usability testing (n>=12), gesture success rate must be >= 92%.

title: Onboarding Flow Completion Time

context.architecture: Microservices, gRPC, OAuth2/OIDC, local encrypted SQLite, device secure enclave
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Ensure new user onboarding is fast and responsive.
acceptanceCriteria: Full onboarding flow must be completable within 90 seconds median on 4G.
Each onboarding screen must load within 800 ms P95.
Total onboarding data transfer must not exceed 12 MB.

title: Secure Deep Link Handling

context.architecture: Native iOS routing, OAuth2/OIDC, validation layer
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Prevent deep link abuse and unauthorized screen access.
acceptanceCriteria: Deep links must be validated within 100 ms before navigation.
Unauthorized deep links must redirect to login within 500 ms.
Malformed deep links must not crash the app in 100% of tested cases.

title: Payment State Consistency Across Devices

context.architecture: Microservices, event bus, distributed cache
context.platform: iOS (iPhone), mobile users (4G/5G)

description: Ensure consistent payment state across multiple logged-in devices.
acceptanceCriteria: Payment status must synchronize across devices within 10 seconds P95.
Conflict resolution must complete within 2 seconds P95.
Inconsistency rate must remain <= 0.1% per month.

title: Dock Door Scheduling Throughput

context.architecture: Web SPA + REST APIs, PostgreSQL, Redis cache, centralized logging
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Ensure dock scheduling remains responsive under heavy planning load.
acceptanceCriteria: System must support 300 scheduling operations/minute with P95 latency <= 600 ms.
Conflict detection must complete within 400 ms P95.
UI update after schedule save must render within 250 ms.

title: Export File Access Control

context.architecture: Web SPA, REST APIs, file service, RBAC
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Ensure exported operational data is protected and auditable.
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthorized export requests must return HTTP 403 within 150 ms.
Export links must expire within 15 minutes.
Each export must be audit-logged within 1 second P95.

title: Cross-Region Read Availability

context.architecture: Geo-replicated DB, read routing, CDN
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Ensure read-only operations remain available during regional issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Read-only endpoints must maintain availability >= 99.95%.
Failover routing must complete within 90 seconds.
Client-visible read errors must remain <= 0.3% during failover.

title: Dashboard Customization Responsiveness

context.architecture: Web SPA, widget service, user preferences store
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Allow users to customize dashboards without lag.
acceptanceCriteria: Adding/removing a widget must reflect within 500 ms.
Saving layout must complete within 800 ms P95.
Customized dashboard load must not exceed 2.5 seconds P95.

title: Cycle Count Processing Performance

context.architecture: Web SPA + REST APIs, PostgreSQL, Redis cache, centralized logging
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Ensure rapid processing of cycle count updates.
acceptanceCriteria: System must process 5,000 count updates/minute with P95 latency <= 300 ms.
Stock reconciliation job must complete within 5 minutes for 1M records.
UI feedback must appear within 200 ms after submission.

title: Temporary Worker Account Expiration

context.architecture: SSO, identity management, RBAC, audit logging
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Ensure temporary staff accounts automatically expire.
acceptanceCriteria: Temporary accounts must auto-disable at configured end time with <= 60 seconds delay.
Expired accounts must receive HTTP 401 on access within 150 ms.
Account state change must be logged within 1 second.

title: Search Index Rebuild Resilience

context.architecture: Search cluster, background rebuild jobs, dual indexing
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Maintain search availability during index rebuilds.
acceptanceCriteria: Search availability must remain >= 99.9% during rebuild.
Index rebuild must complete within 2 hours for 50M records.
Search result freshness must lag no more than 5 minutes.

title: Color-Blind Friendly Status Indicators

context.architecture: Web SPA, design system, ARIA labels
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Ensure operational statuses are distinguishable without color alone.
acceptanceCriteria: All status indicators must include icon or text label.
Contrast ratio must be >= 3.0:1.
Status legend must be accessible within 2 clicks.

title: Batch Shipment Manifest Generation

context.architecture: Web SPA + REST APIs, PostgreSQL, Redis cache, centralized logging
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Generate shipping manifests quickly for large outbound batches.
acceptanceCriteria: Manifest generation for 10,000 shipments must complete within 90 seconds.
Download preparation must complete within 3 seconds P95.
Generation jobs must support 5 concurrent runs without error rate >1%.

title: Session Hijack Detection

context.architecture: Web SPA, session store, anomaly detection
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Detect abnormal session behavior and protect active users.
acceptanceCriteria: Concurrent logins from >2 countries within 5 minutes must trigger session invalidation.
User notification must be issued within 10 seconds of detection.
False positive rate must remain <= 2% per month.

title: Attachment Storage Durability

context.architecture: Object storage, replication, integrity checks
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Ensure documents and attachments are not lost or corrupted.
acceptanceCriteria: Annual durability must be >= 99.999999%.
Integrity checks must cover 100% of new files within 24 hours.
Corruption detection must trigger alerts within 5 minutes.

title: Inline Help and Tooltip Performance

context.architecture: Web SPA, help content service, CDN
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Provide contextual help without disrupting workflows.
acceptanceCriteria: Tooltip display must occur within 120 ms after hover/focus.
Help content fetch must complete within 400 ms P95.
Tooltip text must be readable at 200% zoom without clipping.

title: Wave Planning Optimization Runtime

context.architecture: Optimization engine, async workers, PostgreSQL
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Ensure planning algorithms complete within operational windows.
acceptanceCriteria: Wave optimization for 20,000 order lines must complete within 8 minutes.
Intermediate progress must update at least every 10 seconds.
CPU utilization of optimization workers must remain <= 85% for 95% of runtime.

title: Password Policy Enforcement

context.architecture: Identity provider, validation service
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Enforce strong password policies consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Passwords must require >=12 characters, at least one digit and one symbol.
Weak passwords must be rejected within 150 ms P95.
Password change events must be logged within 1 second.

title: End-of-Day Processing Recovery

context.architecture: Batch jobs, checkpoints, restartable workflows
context.platform: Web browsers (Chrome/Edge), warehouse staff on wired/Wi-Fi

description: Ensure daily processing jobs can recover from interruption.
acceptanceCriteria: End-of-day batch must support restart from last checkpoint with <= 2 minutes setup time.
Full end-of-day processing for normal load must complete within 45 minutes.
Partial failures must not require manual data correction in >99% of cases.

title: Edge Gateway Buffer Flush Performance

context.architecture: Edge gateway, MQTT broker, ingestion service
context.platform: Medical monitoring devices over Wi-Fi/LTE, clinician web console

description: Ensure buffered telemetry is flushed quickly after connectivity returns.
acceptanceCriteria: Buffered data must flush within 180 seconds for 15 minutes of backlog.
Gateway CPU usage during flush must remain <= 75%.
No more than 0.2% of messages may be dropped during flush.

title: Secure Device Decommissioning

context.architecture: Device management service, key revocation, secure erase
context.platform: Medical monitoring devices over Wi-Fi/LTE, clinician web console

description: Ensure devices removed from service cannot access systems or retain PHI.
acceptanceCriteria: Decommission command must revoke credentials within 60 seconds.
Local secure erase must complete within 10 minutes.
Post-decommission connection attempts must fail 100% of the time.

title: Long-Term Telemetry Retention Integrity

context.architecture: Archive storage, integrity scanning, lifecycle policies
context.platform: Medical monitoring devices over Wi-Fi/LTE, clinician web console

description: Ensure historical telemetry remains intact and retrievable.
acceptanceCriteria: Archived telemetry retrieval for 1 year of data must complete within 10 seconds for 95% of queries.
Quarterly integrity scans must cover 100% of archived data.
Detected corruption must be isolated and reported within 15 minutes.

title: Low-Light UI Readability

context.architecture: Clinician console UI, theming engine
context.platform: Medical monitoring devices over Wi-Fi/LTE, clinician web console

description: Ensure UI remains readable in dark clinical environments.
acceptanceCriteria: Dark mode contrast ratio must be >= 4.5:1.
Switching to dark mode must complete within 300 ms.
Eye-strain complaints in usability test (n>=10) must be <= 1 per user.

title: Bulk Patient Import Performance

context.architecture: Clinician console, import service, background processing
context.platform: Medical monitoring devices over Wi-Fi/LTE, clinician web console

description: Support rapid onboarding of patient datasets.
acceptanceCriteria: Import of 100,000 patients must complete within 15 minutes.
UI progress updates must refresh at least every 3 seconds.
Import error rate must remain <= 0.5%.

title: API Token Scope Enforcement

context.architecture: API gateway, OAuth2 scopes, authorization service
context.platform: Medical monitoring devices over Wi-Fi/LTE, clinician web console

description: Ensure API tokens only permit explicitly authorized actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Out-of-scope requests must return HTTP 403 within 150 ms P95.
Scope evaluation must complete within 20 ms P95.
All denied access attempts must be logged within 1 second.

title: Alert Deduplication Accuracy

context.architecture: Rules engine, alerting service, correlation logic
context.platform: Medical monitoring devices over Wi-Fi/LTE, clinician web console

description: Prevent alert flooding by correlating repeated events.
acceptanceCriteria: Duplicate alerts for same condition within 60 seconds must be reduced by >= 95%.
Deduplication decision must occur within 100 ms P95.
False suppression rate must remain <= 1%.

title: Clinician Note Entry Usability

context.architecture: Clinician console, text editor, autosave service
context.platform: Medical monitoring devices over Wi-Fi/LTE, clinician web console

description: Ensure clinicians can quickly and safely enter notes.
acceptanceCriteria: Autosave must trigger every 10 seconds and complete within 300 ms.
No more than 1% of note sessions may lose >5 characters of text.
Median time to enter a standard note (n>=10) must be <= 90 seconds.

title: Anomalous Device Behavior Detection

context.architecture: Behavior analytics, monitoring, alerting service
context.platform: Medical monitoring devices over Wi-Fi/LTE, clinician web console

description: Detect compromised or malfunctioning devices.
acceptanceCriteria: Device sending >3x normal message rate must be flagged within 60 seconds.
Security alert must be generated within 30 seconds of flag.
Detection false negative rate must be <= 2%.

title: End-to-End Alert Delivery SLO

context.architecture: IoT devices, ingestion, rules engine, alerting, notification services
context.platform: Medical monitoring devices over Wi-Fi/LTE, clinician web console

description: Ensure alerts reliably reach clinicians.
acceptanceCriteria: End-to-end alert delivery success rate must be >= 99.8% per day.
P95 alert delivery time from detection to clinician UI must be <= 8 seconds.
If success rate drops below 99.5% for 5 minutes, incident alert must trigger within 60 seconds.
